settings.title: Shipping Policy
settings.content:
We are proud to offer delivery across Lebanon. Here is everything you need to know about our shipping process.

Delivery Areas

We currently deliver nationwide across Lebanon, including Beirut, Mount Lebanon, North Lebanon, South Lebanon, Bekaa, and Nabatieh.

Free Shipping

We offer free shipping on all orders over $50. Orders under $50 may be subject to a delivery fee which will be displayed at checkout.

Processing Time

Orders are processed within 1–2 business days after payment confirmation. You will receive a confirmation email once your order has been dispatched.

Delivery Time

Estimated delivery times within Lebanon:

  • Beirut and Greater Beirut: 1–2 business days
  • Mount Lebanon: 1–3 business days
  • All other regions: 2–4 business days

These are estimates only and may vary due to circumstances outside our control.

Order Tracking

Once your order is dispatched, you will be contacted with tracking information where available.

Questions

For shipping inquiries, contact us at hello@tajilb.com or WhatsApp. We reply within 24 hours.
